# Adam Barnes

> Web designer and photographer based in Norfolk, UK. 25 years of design, digital and technical experience — working with businesses that want both web design and photography handled properly.

Adam Barnes trades as Platform Ticket LTD (Company No: 07755177). He works across the UK, with a particular focus on Norfolk, Suffolk, Essex and Cambridge. He is not an agency — all work is handled personally, from brief through to handover.

## Services

- **Web Design**: Bespoke WordPress builds, custom plugins, hand-coded HTML where performance matters. Full design, development and ongoing support.
- **Photography**: Architecture, events and festivals, theatre, portraits, food and commercial. Official photographer to Firstlight Festival. Festival work at Latitude.

## How it works

1. Brief — client explains what they need
2. Build — Adam designs and develops it
3. Handover — client owns it, fully

## Key facts

- 25 years of experience in design and digital
- One person, not an agency — direct contact throughout
- Based in Norfolk; works across the UK
- Contact: hello@adambarnes.biz / 07725 970028

## Client testimonials

- "A stunningly talented photographer and digital genius." — Brian Bush, Turning Factor
- "Always our first call." — Firstlight Festival, Lowestoft
- "I quite literally wouldn't work with anyone else." — Donna Dawson, London
- "A constant source of website wisdom." — Matt Sykes, Sales Cadence

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.adambarnes.biz/): Overview of services, manifesto, and client testimonials.
- [Web Design](https://www.adambarnes.biz/web-design.html): Web design and WordPress development services, portfolio of work, and how the process works.
- [Photography](https://www.adambarnes.biz/photography.html): Photography portfolio across architecture, events, festivals, theatre, portraits and food.
- [Clients](https://www.adambarnes.biz/clients.html): Selection of brands and businesses worked with across web design, branding and photography.
- [About](https://www.adambarnes.biz/about.html): Background and experience — 25 years of design, digital and technical work.
- [FAQ](https://www.adambarnes.biz/faq.html): Answers to common questions on website costs, timelines, photography bookings and travel.
- [Contact](https://www.adambarnes.biz/contact.html): Enquiry form, phone, email and social links.
- [Case Study — Firstlight Festival](https://www.adambarnes.biz/case-study-firstlight-festival.html): Festival and event photography for Firstlight Festival since 2019, covering beach, stage, backstage, portraits and press calls on the Suffolk coast.
- [Case Study — Gardner Denley](https://www.adambarnes.biz/case-study-gardner-denley.html): Bespoke WordPress website for Gardner Denley, Cambridge's prime property buying agency.
- [Case Study — UK Director Magazine](https://www.adambarnes.biz/case-study-uk-director-magazine.html): WordPress platform build for UK Director Magazine — a multi-county digital media brand across Norfolk, Suffolk and Essex, with member portal and mobile app.
- [Case Study — Macro-Advisory](https://www.adambarnes.biz/case-study-macro-advisory.html): WordPress membership platform connecting content, access control and automated email delivery across four geographic regions.
- [Case Study — Domarn Group](https://www.adambarnes.biz/case-study-domarn-group.html): Government-grade document conversion for Domarn Group — clean HTML and Govspeak for GOV.UK, including work for the Department for Transport.
- [Case Study — Boat Hire Norwich](https://www.adambarnes.biz/case-study-boat-hire-norwich.html): WordPress site and custom booking plugin for Boat Hire Norwich, built around specific timing rules.
- [Case Study — adambarnes.biz](https://www.adambarnes.biz/case-study-adambarnes-biz.html): How and why this site was built without a CMS — pure HTML, CSS and JavaScript — optimised for performance, SEO and GEO.
